scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('server.cjs','dist/server.cjs'); fs.copyFileSync('scraper.cjs','dist/scraper.cjs'); fs.copyFileSync('analyzer.cjs','dist/analyzer.cjs'); fs.copyFileSync('collector.cjs','dist/collector.cjs'); console.log('server.cjs + scraper.cjs + analyzer.cjs + collector.cjs copiados para dist/')"
